options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: character
options.description: Choose your character!

options.name: open_world
options.description:
Unlock all floors immediately, making more levels accessible from the start.

If active, boss keys will be removed from the item pool.

options.name: bonus_ladders
options.description:
Add bonus ladders to Hub to make accessing levels easier.

Floors up to and including the selected floor number are affected.

Set to 0 to disable bonus ladders.

options.name: difficulty
options.description:
Determines how strict the randomizer logic will be, and as a result, how difficult your run may be.

Normal: Stricter logic for new players or those looking for a quick, simple run. The randomizer will never expect you to do anything too technical or creative.

Expert: Relaxed logic for those looking for a challenge. The randomizer may expect you to know obscure mechanics, perform precise tricks, or use glitches or other unintended behavior.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: ring_link
options.description:
Links your in-level point gain/loss with other players.
Point gain is only linked when coming from pizza toppings, pizzasonas, clocks and bells.

options.name: completion_goal
options.description:
Determines your goal in this run.
CTOP: Defeat Pizzaface and complete the Crumbling Tower of Pizza.
Snotty: Kill Snotty. Only levels below Snotty's home floor will be accessible.

options.name: snotty_floor
options.description: Determines which floor Snotty will show up on.

options.name: toppin_count
options.description:
Number of toppins shuffled into the item pool.

May be less than expected if the item pool is too small.

options.name: floor_1_cost
options.description: Percentage of Toppins required to fight the Floor 1 Boss.

options.name: floor_2_cost
options.description: Percentage of Toppins required to fight the Floor 2 Boss.

options.name: floor_3_cost
options.description: Percentage of Toppins required to fight the Floor 3 Boss.

options.name: floor_4_cost
options.description: Percentage of Toppins required to fight the Floor 4 Boss.

options.name: floor_5_cost
options.description: Percentage of Toppins required to fight the Floor 5 Boss.

options.name: shuffle_boss_keys
options.description:
On: Shuffle Boss Keys into the item pool.

Off: Keep Boss Keys in their normal spots.

options.name: treasure_checks
options.description: Adds the game's 19 Treasures to the pool as locations.

options.name: secret_checks
options.description: Adds the game's 57 Secrets to the pool as locations.

options.name: srank_checks
options.description:
Adds the game's 24 S Ranks to the pool as locations.

Obtaining a P Rank in a level will also check its corresponding S Rank location.

options.name: prank_checks
options.description: Adds the game's 24 P Ranks to the pool as locations.

options.name: cheftask_checks
options.description:
Adds the game's 72 Chef Tasks (achievements) to the pool as locations.

If S/P Rank checks are disabled, the no-hit boss Chef Tasks as well as S/P Ranked floor Chef Tasks will set to Excluded.
If Pumpkin checks are enabled, this will also add the 2 pumpkin-related Chef Tasks as checks.

options.name: pumpkin_checks
options.description: Adds the game's 30 pumpkins to the pool as locations.

options.name: pumpkin_count
options.description:
Number of Pumpkins shuffled into the item pool if pumpkin checks is turned on.

May be less than expected if the item pool is too small.

options.name: tricky_treat_cost
options.description: Percentage of Pumpkins required to access Tricky Treat.

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: Set a percentage of how many filler items are replaced with traps here.

options.name: clothing_filler
options.description: Determines whether outfits will be shuffled into the item pool.

options.name: trap_weights
options.description: Determines how often each trap appears in the itempool

options.name: filler_weights
options.description: Determines how often each filler item appears in the itempool

options.name: randomize_levels
options.description: Shuffle level entrances around the Hub.

options.name: randomize_bosses
options.description: Shuffle bosses (except Pizzaface) between floors.

options.name: randomize_secrets
options.description: Shuffle Secrets between levels.

options.name: fairly_random
options.description:
On: The first two levels will have at least two accessible locations each, and the first boss will not require a grab to defeat.

Off: The first two levels and first boss can be anything.

Only applies when Shuffle Level Gates and/or Shuffle Boss Gates are enabled.

options.name: do_move_rando
options.description: Determines whether your moves will be randomized. If disabled, only Toppins, Boss Keys, and filler will appear in the item pool.

options.name: move_rando_list
options.description: If "Randomize Moves" is enabled, any move indicated here will be shuffled into the item pool, and any move not indicated here will be useable from the start.

options.name: do_transfo_rando
options.description:
Determines whether any level-specific Transformations will be shuffled into the item pool.
Enabling this setting in combination with moveset randomization will place 2 movement abilities at the beginning of your world to prevent a restrictive start.

options.name: transfo_rando_list
options.description: If "Randomize Transformations" is enabled, any Transformation indicated here will be shuffled into the item pool, and any not indicated here will be useable from the start.

options.name: shuffle_lap2
options.description:
On: Shuffles an item into the pool that enables all lap 2 portals

Off: Enables all lap 2 portals from the start

options.name: randomize_music
options.description: Determines whether in-game music should be randomized.

options.name: randomize_enemies
options.description: Determines whether an enemy is replaced with a random other enemy.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
